task: Scoot the pot to the counter's far left centre.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A stainless steel pot sits on a wooden countertop. The pot is metallic and has a wide rim. STRATEGY - To move the pot, first reach for its body to grasp it, then transport it to the far left center of the counter. The task requires precise spatial movement to avoid collisions. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the pot body; Step 2 grasp the pot body for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the target position; Step 4 place the pot at the target location.**
Goal: on(pot, counter); position(pot, far_left_center)
Scene: pot, counter
Step 1: reach(pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the pot
  contact: holding(pot) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pot)
Step 3: transport(pot -> far_left_center)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the far left center of the counter
  spatial: above(pot, far_left_center, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pot)
  done_when: above(pot, far_left_center, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pot -> far_left_center)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the far left center of the counter
  contact: surface_contact(pot, far_left_center) [completion]; released(pot) [completion]
  pose: stable(pot) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pot, far_left_center) AND released(pot)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area on the far left center of the counter
an empty area on the far left center of the counter
